patch.value: Daily Release publish step runs prepublishOnly post-tag: align npm publish with --ignore-scripts

Fleet alignment after pm-ts-starter run 27448995157 failed at npm publish: without --ignore-scripts, prepublishOnly re-runs changelog:check AFTER the release tag exists, where the pending-version window suppression (issue #41 in this repo) renders the zero-padded tag heading and the check can never pass. Siblings already publish with --ignore-scripts; full validation still runs pre-tag.
Daily Release with fresh closed pm items publishes to npm without the post-tag changelog:check failure

value.author: pi-agent
value.text: Verified done 2026-07-18: .github/workflows/release.yml line ~360 already runs 'npm publish --access public --provenance --ignore-scripts' — the fleet alignment this task asked for is in place; Daily Releases pass.

patch.value: All fleet repos publish with --access public --provenance --ignore-scripts
Fleet alignment in place; Daily Releases pass (verified 2026-07-18)
